title: Italian Options Velvet Ribbon, Luxury, Single-Face Velvet Ribbon for Crafting, Christmas, Bows, Hair, Cakes, Weddings, Ornaments, Gift Wrapping, Flowers, 9mm x 10 Metre Roll, Vintage Lilac
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Available in over 20 rich colours and 3 widths, our luxurious velvet ribbon is made from plush, single-face velvet. Designed to last, this sumptuous ribbon is easy to cut and won't fray or snag.
PLUSH TEXTURE: Reassuringly thick and super-soft, with a beautiful texture and natural elegance, these non-fraying velvet ribbons for gift wrapping add a premium finish to any project.

A COLOUR FOR EVERY OCCASION: Elevate any gift, cake, craft, wreath, or bouquet with this delightfully tactile fabric ribbon. Available in red, blue, sage green, ivory, cream, pastel shades, and brights, there’s a wrapping ribbon for every occasion.

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Due to its plush texture, velvet ribbon should be handled with care. Shake or lightly brush with a soft clothes brush to remove dust. REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) & OEKO-TEX 100 certified, meeting high safety and quality standards.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
description: From the manufacturer Italian Options Satin Ribbon Bows Self Adhesive 12-Piece Pack, 5 cm Bow Width...
